Spatial Filters

A notebook exploring the different spatial filters that can be applied to a raster image.

Ensure you install terra in order to handle images and other raster data.

library(terra)

Load the raster:

input_image <- rast ("convolution_example.tif")

View the raster metadata:

input_image
class       : SpatRaster 
size        : 664, 892, 4  (nrow, ncol, nlyr)
resolution  : 4.367446e-06, 4.367446e-06  (x, y)
extent      : -97.48433, -97.48044, 35.48961, 35.49251  (xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax)
coord. ref. : lon/lat WGS 84 
source      : convolution_example.tif 
names       : convolu~ample_1, convolu~ample_2, convolu~ample_3, convolu~ample_4

View the raster:

plotRGB(x=input_image)
